Home.title: Free legal help, made simple.
Home.subtitle: Find services near you, read plain-language resources, or start an intake request.
Home.findHelpBody: Search free and low-cost legal aid organizations near you.
Home.resourcesBody: Plain-language answers to common legal questions.
Home.intakeBody: Share your situation and we'll route you to the right help.

FindHelp.title: Find Legal Help
FindHelp.noResults: No organizations match your search. Try a different ZIP or clear the practice-area filter.
FindHelp.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No organizations} one {# organization} other {# organizations}}

items.q: What do I do if I get an eviction notice?
items.a: Do not ignore it. Note the deadline, gather your lease and payment records, and contact a legal aid organization as soon as possible.

items.q: Can I get free legal help?
items.a: Many organizations offer free help based on income. Use Find Legal Help to search by ZIP.

items.q: How do I prepare for a court date?
items.a: Bring a photo ID, all related documents, and a written timeline. Arrive at least 30 minutes early.
A short set of questions that helps an organization understand your situation and decide how to help.

Intake.title: Start an Intake
Intake.intro: Answer a few questions so we can route your request to the right organization. We'll need either a phone number or an email to follow up.
Intake.formError: We couldn't save your request. Please try again.

IntakeThanks.title: Thanks — we got your request.
IntakeThanks.body: A legal aid volunteer will reach out using the contact info you provided. In the meantime, take a look at our plain-language resources.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.body: We couldn't load this page. This is on us, not you. Try again, or come back in a moment.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.body: The page you were looking for doesn't exist. Head back to the home screen to continue.

Offline.title: You're offline
Offline.body: This page isn't cached yet, so we can't show it without a connection. Pages you've already visited (Home, Find Legal Help, Resources, Intake) will still work offline.
